use_cases: Trigger form submissions with styled button variants
Navigate users between pages or sections
Execute actions like save, delete, or confirm operations
Toggle visibility or state of other UI elements
ai_summary: A versatile atomic button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes for triggering actions throughout the scheduler UI. Built with Radix UI Slot for composition flexibility, CVA for variant management, and includes hover, focus-visible, and disabled states for full interaction coverage.
